modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Copying data from Cognos to Excel gives wrong results

full_description_text: I was running a report in Cognos and saw it on my screen. I tried to copy a column with Banner IDs and paste it into Excel, but it didn’t work right. The info that showed up in Excel was all wrong, and I don’t know why. It’s really frustrating because I need that data for my work.
short_description: Copying data from Cognos to Excel gives wrong results
description: I was running a report in Cognos and saw it on my screen. I tried to copy a column with Banner IDs and paste it into Excel, but it didn’t work right. The info that showed up in Excel was all wrong, and I don’t know why. It’s really frustrating because I need that data for my work.
